programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: The investigators are given a chance to explore a mysterious Nazi complex in the Argentinean jungle, and head to Berlin to examine evidence that Hitler could have faked his death(n)

programme.title: Treasure Quest: Snake Island
programme.desc: The treasure hunters discovers more artefacts, leading ever closer to a valuable find. Plus, they meet a local historian who warns them that their objective has a cursed past(n)

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: Examining how the world's finest harp strings are made, how they build roof windows that can keep out a hurricane, and how to make Belgian waffles(n)

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The processes involved in turning scrap metal into luxury cookers. Plus, the hand-rolling of billions of sticks of incense, and the creation of jenever - the original form of gin(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Zara, Sophie, Kev and Yvette try to impress one another during a week of dinner parties in Manchester. Zara kicks off proceedings with a self-styled Libyan meal, before Sophie presents what she calls 'proper food, done well'. Kev offers up restaurant-inspired food, and Yvette pulls out all the stops, including a red carpet, paparazzi and a performance - only for her dessert to disappoint(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four dinner-party hosts compete to win £1,000 in Barnsley, South Yorkshire. Elaine Ashton starts the week off with an American-themed evening, before Sam West tempts his guests with a few unusual delicacies including ostrich egg and pig's ears - and then upsets the next host, local councillor and market trader Wayne Johnson. The final night, hosted by Cindy Broadbent, features a Wild West-style bash that ends in tears for one of the contestants(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four amateur chefs in east Suffolk compete to win the £1,000 prize. UFO enthusiast Jo Jo Smith, agony aunt Janet Gershlick, sales director Paul Emery and department store owner Jim Godfrey host dinner parties featuring a drum solo meant as entertainment, a kitchen meltdown and an unusual cocktail(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jan and Anton host first in Birmingham, with a Spanish menu, before Chris and Kelly and Bally and Manjeet take their turns entertaining the others in the hope of winning £1,000(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Rick Forman, founder and CEO of New Jersey-based discount clothing store Forman Mills, goes incognito among his own staff posing as a contestant on a reality show. He plans to go undercover because he intends to double the number of stores in the next year and wants to make sure that all the outlets are doing well so that revenue doubles too(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Brooklyn, New York, to tackle a 55-year-old family business. Owner John Esposito left school at the age of 14 and has worked at his parents' restaurant, Sal's Pizzeria, ever since. Their success meant they could afford to purchase the location next door in the 1990s, naming it Mama Maria after John's mother, who died in 2002. But when he lost his father as well, John became overwhelmed by the responsibility of running both establishments and his livelihood is at risk(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie starts wearing glasses and begins to see the family in a new light, while Robert gets back together with Amy and invites her to a Thanksgiving dinner. Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett star(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray lies to Debra, pretending he has bought her something extra special for Christmas - then has to seek Robert's advice to choose a gift that lives up to his extravagant claims. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink considers throwing away an old broken pot until it stirs up fond memories, including the time he was accidentally glued to a blind date and a Thanksgiving when everyone seemed to be down on their luck. American comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and John Mahoney(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. Frasier's final dinner with Charlotte is ruined by constant interruptions, Martin and Ronee's wedding day is marked by a series of calamities, and Daphne goes into labour at a veterinary practice. Jason Biggs, Robbie Coltrane and Richard E Grant guest star alongside regulars Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney in the series' penultimate episode(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Steve and Sandra met while serving in the Royal Navy, and now that Steve is on the verge of retirement they're looking for a Spanish bolthole to 'wind down' in. They love the area around Casares, so Jasmine Harman is on hand to show them five available properties within their £100,000 budget(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, an artist from Bath finds a new way to bring in some money. Meanwhile, a Leicester couple teach locals how to make the perfect paella on the east coast of Spain(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bob's in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters aren't improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before it's too late(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: The crews are stretched to their limits as they deal with a 19-year-old man who has suffered a motorbike crash, and an elderly woman showing signs of a stroke but refusing treatment as it means she will leave behind her beloved husband of over 40 years(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the importance of the father-son relationship and the potential consequences and difficulties when this relationship is not a positive one. Frontline officers talk frankly about their experiences of how the breakdown of this pivotal formative experience can lead to young men perpetuating cycles of violence, lacking confidence, or struggling with mental health problems(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A look at the night shift in a busy A&E department. A woman with a severe form of autism is brought in, having suffered an injury to one of her fingers. While she is treated, her sister shares stories of their childhood and the challenges their family have faced. An 82-year-old patient has difficulty breathing, and doctors suspect he has developed life-threatening sepsis and need to act fast to try to halt the spread of infection(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Junior doctor Silas works his first ever shift in resus, and is part of the team brought in to treat a biker who is rushed to A&E after riding into a lamppost. A two-year-old boy is treated for injuries resulting from a fall, and his mother shares the story of how her eldest son was recently attacked by a gang(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. She is joined by 25-year-old estate agent Hollie-Anna from Margate and 29-year-old Jaison from Norwich, a transsexual man who feels like he has exhausted his local dating pool. They will both choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. But will they prove to be a good match?(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and Katherine Ryan join Sean Lock and Jon Richardson for the words-and-numbers game, while David O'Doherty joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: Diamond Dealers and Cockney Geezers
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at Trotters Jewellers in Bethnal Green in London's East End, a family-run business the ownership of which has recently passed to 26-year-old Judd, who manages with old schoolmates Alex and Kallum. The film shows the team designing a commemorative piece for a current world champion boxer, while a bricklayer splashes out on a £9,000 watch, a man buys a diamond necklace to say sorry. Plus, staff travel to New York to get ahead of the trends and meet jeweller to the stars Richie Rich(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet a couple in Rushden in Northamptonshire who are unsure whether they should renovate their current home or sell up and move into another. Susan and John are torn over their unique five-bed character home, so Kirstie and Phil offer their expert advice in an effort to help them make the right decision for their family's future(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. The School House B&B is first and host Jayne Hall-Edwards takes guests back to basics over her green policy. Next, Neil Chidzey and Jo Goodwin from Cathedral 73 challenge their guests over costings(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pescatarian Chris kicks off the contest in Glasgow, and is out to impress with his full-on fish menu, before George, Lucky and Linda take their turns hosting(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The dinner-party challenge comes to Bristol, where American Keith Weinberg, fun-loving Rachel Flowers, extrovert Andy Holbert and legal trainee Jen Elphick compete to win £1,000. The week's highlights include some 'gert lush', a revealing outfit, a personal homage to the work of PJ and Duncan and a best of British theme(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four amateur chefs from Manchester take turns hosting dinner parties in an effort to win the £1,000 prize. Food critic Mark Garner, tarot-card reader Pascha Taylor, pub landlord Jon Patullo and free spirit Jilly Fitzgerald try to impress the other contestants with evenings featuring Russian food, upmarket gastropub fare and Mediterranean dishes(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples in Manchester compete to throw the perfect dinner party, leading to language mishaps, a pescatarian disappointment, and a generous Italian feast(n)

programme.desc: Jessica Herrin, the founder and CEO of direct sales company Stella & Dot, goes undercover. She pretends to be a reality show contestant to access the workforce and find out whether her original vision for the firm is still being carried out as the organisation grows(n)

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Wilkinsburg in Pennsylvania, home to Ms Jean's Southern Cuisine, which was opened by retired special-education teacher Jean Gould. During the chef's attempt to save the business from disaster, he discovers her soul-food restaurant resembles a dentist's waiting room and finds a lot of tension between Jean and her employees, who claim she is a Jekyll-and-Hyde character(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank blithely starts helping himself to the snacks on sale in a local supermarket - much to the anger of the manager, who wastes no time in confronting him. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, with Jeff Garlin(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray offers to appear as a guest on a local radio show, but is dismayed to discover the host hates him. To make matters worse, Robert digs up some childhood grievances. Comedy, starring Ray Romano(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. The last-ever episode of the sitcom sees Daphne give birth to a son, Martin and Ronee tie the knot and Roz surprise besotted Noel with a kiss. Faced with an empty apartment, Frasier records his final radio show before jetting off to pastures new. Anthony LaPaglia and Richard E Grant guest star(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The psychiatrist abandons his bar-propping in Boston in favour of presenting a radio show in Seattle. However, his new life is thrown into upheaval when his father moves in with him - followed by apparently psychic care assistant Daphne. First-ever episode of the comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Friends Carmen and Tanya are looking for a holiday home on the Caribbean island of Antigua, so Danni Menzies searches for something in Carmen's £390,000 price range(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: The weather is not on the expats' side as a heatwave strikes a glamping site in the Sierra Nevada desert and a storm threatens a Bristol artist's perfectly planned painting retreat(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George returns to a grand Victorian villa in Ormskirk to follow the next stage of its renovation. Having previously created a luxurious master en suite, his next task is to tackle the giant kitchen and utility area. He also visits a typical Victorian mansion block in London. Although structurally sound, the flat has been virtually untouched over the years. The result is dismal and depressing with a spare room that feels like a prison cell. Can George mastermind a plan to free up this criminal waste of space?(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Farage: The Man Who Made Brexit
programme.desc: Filmed over five months, this documentary explores the world of the British politician Nigel Farage as he attempts to build on his historic success in May 2019's European elections. This documentary captures the inside story of Farage's doomed attempt to persuade Boris Johnson to join a Leavers' Alliance with him, and also charts Farage's influence in changing British politics in the wake of the 2016 EU referendum. With racism returning to haunt the party and plummeting poll ratings, is December 2019's general election the event that finally persuades Farage that the UK will never buy what he is selling? Or can he claim victory with a brand-new right-leaning Tory government that supports much of what he stands for?(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Glyn, a 60-year-old disco-dancing entertainer from Essex, hopes to find the perfect partner with whom he can dance off into the sunset. Twenty-eight-year-old Jamie has been on lots of dates, but she keeps meeting cheaters who leave her feeling cold, and needs the show's help to find an honest guy. Presented by Anna Richardson(n)

programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. programme.desc: Dinner-party challenge from East London and Essex, which begins with business founder Yemi, who is hoping to impress with a Nigerian party night(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac suspects he could be next on a killer's list of targets after learning two men who share his name have been murdered, and sets about rounding up his other namesakes for questioning. Detective drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS

programme.desc: Journalist and TV presenter Esther Rantzen, snooker pundit John Virgo and radio DJ Edith Bowman are challenged to come up with the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds.
